headline: Lunr Capital Grows Loan Portfolio 9x After Replacing Spreadsheets with LoanPro
summary: SALT LAKE CITY, June 09, 2026--LoanPro, the modern lending and credit platform, today announced that Lunr Capital, a provider of non-dilutive inventory financing for consumer brands, has grown the number of loans it manages 9x since implementing LoanPro, while reducing manual loan management time by roughly 20% and driving its servicing error rate to near zero.

headline: Dollar General's Same-Store Sales Strength Suggests More Growth Ahead
summary: Dollar General's Q1 FY2026 same-store sales rise 2% on higher traffic, with positive comps across categories, supporting its 2.2%-2.7% view.

raw.headline: Dollar General's Same-Store Sales Strength Suggests More Growth Ahead
raw.summary: Dollar General's Q1 FY2026 same-store sales rise 2% on higher traffic, with positive comps across categories, supporting its 2.2%-2.7% view.

headline: Kohl's Home Gains Traction: Will Newness Drive Continued Growth?
summary: Kohl's Home steadies Q1 comps as Shark, Ninja and new in-house lines boost momentum after a 400-basis point rebound from Q4.

raw.headline: Kohl's Home Gains Traction: Will Newness Drive Continued Growth?
raw.summary: Kohl's Home steadies Q1 comps as Shark, Ninja and new in-house lines boost momentum after a 400-basis point rebound from Q4.

headline: Cohen & Steers Income Opportunities REIT, Inc. Acquires 1890 Ranch Shopping Center in Austin, Texas
summary: Cohen & Steers Income Opportunities REIT, Inc. ("CNSREIT") today announced its latest acquisition, a high-quality community shopping center on the north side of Austin, Texas. The investment was made through a programmatic joint venture with Sterling Organization, a real estate investment firm that specializes in shopping centers in the U.S.
